login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue tracking your meals

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join us to start tracking your meals with AI

checkEmail.title: Check Your Email
checkEmail.tipText: If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.

verification.title: Email Verification
verification.verifyingMessage: Please wait while we verify your email address...
verification.successMessage: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in to your account.
verification.invalidLinkMessage: The verification link is invalid or missing. Please check your email for the correct link.
verification.signInAndRequest: Sign in and request a new one
verification.resendPrompt: Enter your email to receive a new verification link:
verification.resendSuccess: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
validation.passwordStrength: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number
validation.firstNameMax: First name must be less than {{max}} characters
validation.lastNameMax: Last name must be less than {{max}} characters

profile.title: Profile & Health Context
profile.subtitle: Tell the app about ongoing health context that should affect nutrition reports.
profile.healthContextHelp: Use plain language for allergies, life stage, diet pattern, or goals.
profile.healthContextPlaceholder: Example: I am vegetarian, pregnant, and trying to improve iron intake.
profile.healthContextAppliedAtHelp: Optional date used by the backend when evaluating report periods.
profile.voiceHelp: Record a short voice note if that is faster than typing.
profile.structuredHelp: This is the backend-parsed version of your note used for report guidance.
profile.structuredEmpty: Structured context will appear after you save text or upload a voice note.

appInfo.title: Food Tracking App
appInfo.description: Track your meals with AI-powered voice recognition. Simply speak what you ate and let our AI analyze the nutritional content.
